fsymSecurityId.description: FactSet Security Identifier (-S). If Cash or Generic Id holding, response will just pass through generic id (e.g. CASH_USD).

fsymRegionalId.description: FactSet Regional Identifier (-R). If Cash or Generic Id holding, response will just pass through generic id (e.g. CASH_USD).

adjHolding.description: Shares held adjusted. Units in Millions.

unadjHolding.description: Shares held unadjusted. Units in Millions.

adjMarketValue.description: Market value adjusted. Market Value represented in Millions.
